goals.short_name: British Columbians enjoy safe, well-managed parks and protected areas

main_services.name: Get authorization to operate or hold an event in a park

goals.short_name: B.C.'s air, land and water are protected from pollution and contamination

main_services.name: Get authorization to discharge waste to the environment
Investigate and remediate a contaminated site
Sell, use or manage pesticides safely

goals.short_name: Major projects undergo rigorous, efficient environmental assessment

main_services.name: Get an environmental assessment for a major project

goals.short_name: B.C.'s air quality is monitored and natural resource laws are enforced

main_services.name: Check air quality before you go outside
Get help with human-wildlife conflict and natural resource enforcement

acts.summary: The province's core environmental protection statute. Governs waste discharge authorizations, contaminated site remediation, spill prevention and response, air contaminant controls, recycling regulation, and establishes the Conservation Officer Service.

sections.title: Waste disposal authorizations
sections.description: Prohibits introducing waste into the environment except as authorized by permit, approval or regulation.

services.name: Apply for a waste discharge permit or approval
services.ms_name: Get authorization to discharge waste to the environment

services.name: Check the status of a waste discharge authorization application
services.ms_name: Get authorization to discharge waste to the environment

sections.title: Compliance and enforcement
sections.description: Inspection, seizure, administrative penalty and other compliance tools used to enforce authorizations.

services.name: Comply with and report under a waste discharge authorization
services.ms_name: Get authorization to discharge waste to the environment

sections.title: Site disclosure statements
sections.description: Requires disclosure of information when a site changes use, ownership or zoning in circumstances that may indicate contamination.

services.name: Identify and disclose a potentially contaminated site
services.ms_name: Investigate and remediate a contaminated site

sections.title: Contaminated site remediation
sections.description: Framework for identifying, investigating and remediating contaminated sites and allocating liability.

services.name: Apply for contaminated site remediation services
services.ms_name: Investigate and remediate a contaminated site

sections.title: Approvals in principle and certificates of compliance
sections.description: Provides for certificates confirming a contaminated site has been remediated to the required standard.

services.name: Get a certificate of compliance for a remediated site
services.ms_name: Investigate and remediate a contaminated site

sections.title: Spill prevention and reporting
sections.description: Requires responsible persons to report spills and take reasonable measures to prevent and mitigate them.

services.name: Report a spill or environmental emergency
services.ms_name: Respond to spills and pollution

sections.title: Conservation Officer Service
sections.description: Establishes the Conservation Officer Service and its powers to investigate and enforce fisheries, wildlife and environmental protection laws.

services.name: Report a poacher, polluter or environmental violation (RAPP)
services.ms_name: Respond to spills and pollution

services.name: Contact the Conservation Officer Service
services.ms_name: Get help with human-wildlife conflict and natural resource enforcement

sections.title: Extended Producer Responsibility
sections.description: Regulation under the EMA requiring producers of designated products to fund and manage end-of-life recycling programs.

services.name: Find where to recycle a product
services.ms_name: Reduce waste and recycle

services.name: Develop and file an extended producer responsibility stewardship plan
services.ms_name: Reduce waste and recycle

sections.title: Control of air contaminants
sections.description: Authority to regulate the release of air contaminants to protect air quality.

services.name: Check current air quality and health index readings
services.ms_name: Check air quality before you go outside

sections.title: Burning regulations
sections.description: Regulates open burning, including ventilation index restrictions on when burning is permitted.

services.name: Get a permit to conduct open burning
services.ms_name: Check air quality before you go outside

acts.summary: Governs the establishment, classification and management of provincial parks, conservancies and recreation areas, including permits for occupancy, commercial activity and film production.

sections.title: Issuing permits
sections.description: Authority for the director to issue permits for the use and occupancy of park land.

services.name: Reserve a provincial park campsite
services.ms_name: Camp and visit BC Parks

services.name: Reserve a backcountry campsite, shelter or canoe circuit
services.ms_name: Camp and visit BC Parks

services.name: Apply for a park use permit
services.ms_name: Get authorization to operate or hold an event in a park

sections.title: Occupancy and use of land restricted
sections.description: Restricts occupancy and use of park land except as authorized, the basis for day-use pass and capacity management measures.

services.name: Get a day-use pass for a busy provincial park
services.ms_name: Camp and visit BC Parks

sections.title: Film production
sections.description: Provides authority for the minister to regulate film production activity in parks.

services.name: Apply for a commercial filming permit in a provincial park
services.ms_name: Get authorization to operate or hold an event in a park

acts.summary: Establishes the environmental assessment process for reviewable major projects in B.C., led by the Environmental Assessment Office, including public and Indigenous participation requirements.

sections.title: Assessment of reviewable projects
sections.description: Sets out the process for assessing a reviewable project's potential environmental, economic, social, cultural and health effects.

services.name: Apply for an environmental assessment certificate
services.ms_name: Get an environmental assessment for a major project

services.name: Check the status of a project under environmental assessment
services.ms_name: Get an environmental assessment for a major project

sections.title: Public and Indigenous participation
sections.description: Requires opportunities for public comment and consultation with Indigenous nations during an assessment.

services.name: Comment on a project undergoing environmental assessment
services.ms_name: Get an environmental assessment for a major project

acts.summary: Regulates the sale, use, storage and transportation of pesticides in B.C., including certification, licensing and compliance requirements.

sections.title: Certificate for sale or use of pesticides
sections.description: Requires individuals to hold a certificate to sell or use most pesticides.

services.name: Get certified to sell or use pesticides
services.ms_name: Sell, use or manage pesticides safely

sections.title: Licence and permit for pesticide use
sections.description: Requires a licence to sell pesticides and a permit for certain uses of pesticides.

services.name: Apply for a permit to use pesticides commercially
services.ms_name: Sell, use or manage pesticides safely

sections.title: Compliance
sections.description: Inspection, suspension, revocation and administrative penalty tools to enforce the Act.

services.name: Report a pesticide-related concern
services.ms_name: Sell, use or manage pesticides safely
